name: 全网比价（买手）
examples_zh: 帮我搜索 iPhone 16 Pro 256G 在淘宝、京东、拼多多的价格和可用优惠券
比较戴森 V12 吸尘器在天猫、京东和抖音电商的到手价，并给出购买链接
按关键词"人体工学椅"查找多平台高性价比商品，列出券后价和店铺信息
examples_en: Search for iPhone 16 Pro 256GB prices and available coupons across Taobao, JD, and Pinduoduo
Compare the final prices for the Dyson V12 vacuum on Tmall, JD, and Douyin e-commerce and provide purchase links
Find value-for-money ergonomic chairs across major Chinese e-commerce platforms, including coupon prices and shop details
